option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Maven build output /target/
# IntelliJ IDEA project metadata /.idea/* !/.idea/.gitignore *.iml
# SmartTomcat / local server metadata /.smarttomcat/
# Deployed data directory (data is stored in src/data only) /src/main/webapp/data/

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<%@ page contentType="text/html;charset=UTF-8" language="java" %> Add Instructor - DSMS
<%@ include file="/includes/sidebar.jsp" %>

➕ Add New Instructor

Fill in the form below to add a new instructor

Cancel

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<%@ page contentType="text/html;charset=UTF-8" language="java" %> <%@ taglib uri="jakarta.tags.core" prefix="c" %> Add Student - DSMS
<%@ include file="/includes/sidebar.jsp" %>

➕ Add New Student

Fill in the form below to add a new student

${validationError}
Cancel

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<%@ page contentType="text/html;charset=UTF-8" language="java" %> Edit Instructor - DSMS
<%@ include file="/includes/sidebar.jsp" %>

✏️ Edit Instructor

Update instructor information

Username cannot be changed
Only fill if you want to change the password
Cancel
